body.title: Switch /query-ticket and context-load Step 5.95 to mcp queue_next
body.result: query-ticket and context-load Step 5.95 now call mcp__datacenter__queue_next; cc_queue.py fallback removed
body.description:
The /query-ticket skill was built with a cc_queue.py fallback and a 'When ADC queue device ships, replace this with mcp call' note. Ship that switch. Also update /context-load Step 5.95 which does the same cc_queue.py next call inline.

New Step 1 in /query-ticket: call `mcp__datacenter__queue_next(worker=WORKER)` instead of cc_queue.py. Remove the 'fallback' framing — the MCP path is now canonical. Keep the same output shape (ticket JSON → surface to Akien).

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/query-ticket/SKILL.md, ~/.claude/skills/context-load/SKILL.md (Step 5.95), ~/dev/src/UnseenUniversity/lab/claudecode/cc_skills/query-ticket/SKILL.md (mirror)
**Design rules:** MCP-first when device exists; /query-ticket stays read-only, never claims
**Scope boundary:** skill file updates to use MCP path; NOT touch cc_queue.py; NOT touch sprint-ticket
**Test plan:** no automated tests (skill files); visual verify: /query-ticket Step 1 calls mcp__datacenter__queue_next; cc_queue.py fallback removed; context-load Step 5.95 updated to match
